---
title: "Mary Anne Wilcox"
---

## Mary Anne Wilcox

**Dates:** (1813-22 March 1870)

**Maiden name:** (Marwood)

### Description

mother of Margaret Wilcox, half-aunt of Lewis Carroll

### Biography

She married (1834) William Wilcox (1801-1872) and had 14 children.  She was a daughter of Lucy (Hume) Dodgson, Lewis Carroll\'s grandmother, by her second marriage.

### Letters

- Letter from March 16th [1869]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
